goals: Discover what unit conversion categories are available for the project
List available units in the length category for design specifications
Convert a design measurement from inches to centimeters for print materials
Convert digital file sizes for asset management purposes

user_agent_config.personality: Pragmatic and detail-oriented. Prefers getting the information needed to complete tasks efficiently without unnecessary exploration.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands technical measurements and unit systems from a software development perspective but may need clarification on specific unit conversions for design work. Does not know internal tool names or APIs.

end_condition: The user has completed all unit conversions needed for the graphic design collaboration project and has the converted values for both physical measurements and digital file sizes.
